step_rationale: NLRP3 inflammasome-derived cytokine; drives atherosclerotic plaque inflammation and instability contributing to MI pathogenesis.
mechanism: Interleukin-18 is an inflammasome-processed cytokine that promotes atherosclerotic inflammation, immune activation, and plaque destabilization in the atherothrombotic cascade leading to MI.
